source: hand-written hp-15z corrected action-arbitration tending fixture
notes: A less-destructive recovery ActionPlan (agent.ask_status) is already accepted and in flight for GreenBear when a later destructive kill_wedged_process ActionPlan targets the same agent and swarm. Per plan.md §8.8 and hp-15z, arbitration rejects the destructive plan as superseded_by the safer in-flight plan and records the link to the winning safety run.
